chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const: Petition No.D-965 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.4085/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on o/objection. 3. For orders on CMA No.4086/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.4089/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case. 30.07.2025 None present..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2to5. The division bench, today, as per the Summer Roster, comprises a member of the Constitutional Bench and another member of the Regular Bench of the High Court. The petitioner Counsel is called absent. None are present. No intimation is received. Notwithstanding the foregoing, petitioner has challenged the interlocutory Order passed by the Banking Court exercising jurisdiction under the provisions of the Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance, 2001 (FIO, 2001). Office to list the matter according to Roster on maintainability given Section 22 of the FIO, 2001, and specifically, Section 22 of the said Ordinance. Adjourned to date in Office. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
